detail.description: Nick Madrigal singles on a ground ball to second baseman Ben Williamson. Oswald Peraza scores.
Nick Madrigal singles on a ground ball to left fielder Ryan Vilade, deflected by third baseman Junior Caminero.
Nick Madrigal singles on a ground ball to left fielder Brice Matthews, deflected by pitcher Peter Lambert.
Nick Madrigal singles on a line drive to right fielder Cam Smith. Jo Adell to 2nd.
Nick Madrigal singles on a line drive to center fielder Jake McCarthy. Oswald Peraza scores.
Nick Madrigal singles on a line drive to left fielder Sterlin Thompson.
Nick Madrigal singles on a line drive to center fielder Jake McCarthy.
Nick Madrigal singles on a sharp ground ball to right fielder Tyler Freeman. Donovan Walton to 2nd.
Nick Madrigal singles on a ground ball to center fielder Alex Call.
Nick Madrigal doubles (1) on a line drive to left fielder Alex Call.
Nick Madrigal singles on a ground ball to left fielder Chandler Simpson, deflected by third baseman Junior Caminero.
Nick Madrigal singles on a soft line drive to right fielder Ryan Vilade. Oswald Peraza to 2nd.
